hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // "unknown"' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.tsx) cd /Users/gabeperez/Documents/GitHub/inventory-app && ISSUES=$(grep -n "text-gray-\|bg-gray-\|border-gray-\|shadow-sm\b\|shadow-md\b\|shadow-lg\b" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -10); DIVCLICK=$(grep -n '<div[^>]*onClick\|<span[^>]*onClick' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'fixed inset-0' | head -5); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ] || [ -n "$DIVCLICK" ]; then MSG="UX ISSUES in $(basename $f):"; [ -n "$ISSUES" ] && MSG="$MSG OFF-BRAND TOKENS: $ISSUES."; [ -n "$DIVCLICK" ] && MSG="$MSG DIV-ONCLICK (use <button>): $DIVCLICK."; MSG="$MSG FIX THESE NOW before proceeding. See reference/ux-checklist.md."; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"$MSG\"}}"; fi ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // "unknown"' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md|*.json|*.env*|*settings*|*MEMORY*|*memory*|*plans/*) exit 0 ;; esac; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"SKILL GATE CHECK: Before editing code, have you invoked the relevant skill? If not, STOP and invoke it FIRST. Skill gates are BLOCKING per CLAUDE.md — no exceptions, even for small fixes. UI → frontend-design. API/backend → engineering-skills. Architecture → engineering-skills. DB → engineering-advanced-skills. Security → engineering-advanced-skills. Product/UX → product-skills."}}'; }
